Architecture

What this calculator measures

It estimates incremental value from leads, conversion, average contract value and expected system improvement.

  • More useful opportunities
  • Less friction loss
  • Better follow-up
  • Revenue-linked reporting

System

ROI drivers

ROI does not come from adding software. It comes when the system improves focus, speed, conversion and traceability.

  • Data quality
  • Account priority
  • Automation
  • Marketing-sales alignment
